sentences.en: The sun is shining.
sentences.zh: 太阳在照耀。

sentences.en: The birds are singing.
sentences.zh: 鸟儿在歌唱。

sentences.en: A new day begins.
sentences.zh: 新的一天开始了。

sentences.en: I open my eyes and smile.
sentences.zh: 我睁开眼睛微笑。

sentences.en: Today is a good day.
sentences.zh: 今天是美好的一天。

sentences.en: I get out of bed and stretch.
sentences.zh: 我起床伸了个懒腰。

sentences.en: I walk to the window and look outside.
sentences.zh: 我走到窗边向外看。

sentences.en: The sky is blue and clean.
sentences.zh: 天空湛蓝洁净。

sentences.en: I take a deep breath.
sentences.zh: 我深吸了一口气。

sentences.en: I am ready for the day.
sentences.zh: 我为这一天做好了准备。

sentences.en: I have a small family.
sentences.zh: 我有一个小家庭。

sentences.en: There are three people in my family.
sentences.zh: 我家里有三口人。

sentences.en: My mother, my father, and me.
sentences.zh: 我的妈妈、爸爸和我。

sentences.en: We live in a small house near a park.
sentences.zh: 我们住在公园附近的一个小房子里。

sentences.en: My mother is a teacher.
sentences.zh: 我的妈妈是一名老师。

sentences.en: She teaches English at a school.
sentences.zh: 她在一所学校教英语。

sentences.en: My father is a doctor.
sentences.zh: 我的爸爸是一名医生。

sentences.en: He helps sick people.
sentences.zh: 他帮助生病的人。

sentences.en: I am a student.
sentences.zh: 我是一名学生。

sentences.en: I study at school.
sentences.zh: 我在学校学习。

sentences.en: We have dinner together every evening.
sentences.zh: 我们每晚一起吃晚餐。

questions.zh: 主人公家里有几口人？

sentences.en: Today I go to the market with my mother.
sentences.zh: 今天我和妈妈去市场。

sentences.en: The market is big and busy.
sentences.zh: 市场又大又繁忙。

sentences.en: There are many people there.
sentences.zh: 那里有很多人。

sentences.en: We see fresh fruits and vegetables.
sentences.zh: 我们看到新鲜的水果和蔬菜。

sentences.en: I like red apples and yellow bananas.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢红苹果和黄香蕉。

sentences.en: My mother buys some oranges and milk.
sentences.zh: 我妈妈买了一些橙子和牛奶。

sentences.en: We also buy bread and eggs for breakfast.
sentences.zh: 我们还买了面包和鸡蛋当早餐。

sentences.en: I help my mother carry the bags.
sentences.zh: 我帮妈妈拿袋子。

sentences.en: She says I am a good boy.
sentences.zh: 她说我是个好孩子。

sentences.en: My best friend is Tom.
sentences.zh: 我最好的朋友是汤姆。

sentences.en: He is ten years old like me.
sentences.zh: 他和我一样十岁。

sentences.en: We go to the same school.
sentences.zh: 我们去同一所学校。

sentences.en: We sit next to each other in class.
sentences.zh: 我们在课堂上坐在一起。

sentences.en: After school, we play soccer in the park.
sentences.zh: 放学后，我们在公园踢足球。

sentences.en: Tom is very funny.
sentences.zh: 汤姆很有趣。

sentences.en: He makes me laugh every day.
sentences.zh: 他每天都逗我笑。

sentences.en: Sometimes we do homework together.
sentences.zh: 有时我们一起做作业。

sentences.en: I am happy to have a friend like Tom.
sentences.zh: 我很高兴有像汤姆这样的朋友。

sentences.en: Friends make life better.
sentences.zh: 朋友让生活更美好。

questions.question: What is the name of the narrator's best friend?
questions.zh: What is the name of the narrator's best friend?

questions.zh: What do they do after school?

sentences.en: The weather changes every day.
sentences.zh: 天气每天都在变化。

sentences.en: In spring, it is warm and rainy.
sentences.zh: 春天，天气温暖多雨。

sentences.en: Flowers begin to grow.
sentences.zh: 花儿开始生长。

sentences.en: In summer, it is hot and sunny.
sentences.zh: 夏天，天气炎热晴朗。

sentences.en: I like to swim in the pool.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢在游泳池里游泳。

sentences.en: In autumn, the leaves turn yellow and red.
sentences.zh: 秋天，树叶变成黄色和红色。

sentences.en: They fall from the trees.
sentences.zh: 它们从树上落下。

sentences.en: In winter, it is cold and snowy.
sentences.zh: 冬天，天气寒冷多雪。

sentences.en: I wear a warm coat and play in the snow.
sentences.zh: 我穿着温暖的外套在雪地里玩耍。

sentences.en: Every season is special.
sentences.zh: 每个季节都很特别。

questions.zh: How often does the weather change?

questions.zh: What is the weather like in spring?

questions.zh: What does the writer like to do in summer?

questions.zh: What happens to leaves in autumn?

sentences.en: Last Sunday, my family visited the zoo.
sentences.zh: 上个星期天，我和家人参观了动物园。

sentences.en: We saw many animals.
sentences.zh: 我们看到许多动物。

sentences.en: Lions were sleeping under a tree.
sentences.zh: 狮子正在树下睡觉。

sentences.en: Monkeys were jumping and playing.
sentences.zh: 猴子们在跳跃和玩耍。

sentences.en: Elephants were eating leaves.
sentences.zh: 大象正在吃叶子。

sentences.en: I liked the pandas best.
sentences.zh: 我最喜欢熊猫。

sentences.en: They were black and white and very cute.
sentences.zh: 它们是黑白相间的，非常可爱。

sentences.en: My sister liked the colorful birds.
sentences.zh: 我姐姐喜欢色彩鲜艳的鸟。

sentences.en: We took many photos.
sentences.zh: 我们拍了许多照片。

sentences.en: It was a wonderful day at the zoo.
sentences.zh: 在动物园度过了美好的一天。

questions.zh: When did the family visit the zoo?

questions.zh: What were the lions doing?

questions.zh: Which animal did the writer like best?

options: black and white and very cute
questions.answer: black and white and very cute

sentences.en: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning.
sentences.zh: 我每天早上七点起床。

sentences.en: I brush my teeth and wash my face.
sentences.zh: 我刷牙洗脸。

sentences.en: Then I eat breakfast with my family.
sentences.zh: 然后我和家人一起吃早餐。

sentences.en: I usually have milk and bread.
sentences.zh: 我通常喝牛奶吃面包。

sentences.en: I go to school at eight o'clock.
sentences.zh: 我八点去上学。

sentences.en: Classes start at half past eight.
sentences.zh: 八点半开始上课。

sentences.en: I have lunch at school.
sentences.zh: 我在学校吃午饭。

sentences.en: I go home at four o'clock.
sentences.zh: 我四点回家。

sentences.en: I do my homework and play.
sentences.zh: 我做作业和玩耍。

sentences.en: I go to bed at nine o'clock.
sentences.zh: 我九点睡觉。

sentences.en: Yesterday was my birthday.
sentences.zh: 昨天是我的生日。

sentences.en: I was very excited.
sentences.zh: 我非常兴奋。

sentences.en: My mother made a big cake.
sentences.zh: 我妈妈做了一个大蛋糕。

sentences.en: It was chocolate with white cream.
sentences.zh: 是巧克力加白色奶油做的。

sentences.en: My friends came to my house.
sentences.zh: 我的朋友们来到我家。

sentences.en: We played games and had fun.
sentences.zh: 我们玩游戏，玩得很开心。

sentences.en: We ate cake and drank juice.
sentences.zh: 我们吃了蛋糕，喝了果汁。

sentences.en: Everyone sang Happy Birthday to me.
sentences.zh: 大家都为我唱生日快乐歌。

sentences.en: I got many presents.
sentences.zh: 我收到了很多礼物。

sentences.en: I received a book and a toy car.
sentences.zh: 我收到了一本书和一辆玩具车。

sentences.en: It was the best birthday ever.
sentences.zh: 这是有史以来最好的生日。

sentences.en: Our classroom is big and clean.
sentences.zh: 我们的教室又大又干净。

sentences.en: There are twenty desks and chairs.
sentences.zh: 有二十张书桌和椅子。

sentences.en: A blackboard is on the wall.
sentences.zh: 黑板在墙上。

sentences.en: Our teacher is kind but strict.
sentences.zh: 我们的老师和蔼但严格。

sentences.en: She teaches us math and English.
sentences.zh: 她教我们数学和英语。

sentences.en: We listen carefully and take notes.
sentences.zh: 我们认真听讲并做笔记。

sentences.en: Sometimes we work in groups.
sentences.zh: 有时我们分组学习。

sentences.en: We help each other with problems.
sentences.zh: 我们互相帮助解决问题。

sentences.en: When I don't understand, I raise my hand and ask.
sentences.zh: 当我不懂的时候，我举手提问。

sentences.en: Learning is fun every day.
sentences.zh: 每天学习都很有趣。

questions.zh: What is the classroom like?

sentences.en: I have a pet dog.
sentences.zh: 我有一只宠物狗。

sentences.en: His name is Max.
sentences.zh: 它的名字叫Max。

sentences.en: He is small and brown.
sentences.zh: 它很小，是棕色的。

sentences.en: He has big eyes and a long tail.
sentences.zh: 它有大眼睛和长尾巴。

sentences.en: Max is very friendly.
sentences.zh: Max非常友好。

sentences.en: He wags his tail when I come home.
sentences.zh: 当我回家时，它会摇尾巴。

sentences.en: I take Max for a walk every evening.
sentences.zh: 我每天晚上带Max去散步。

sentences.en: He likes to run in the park.
sentences.zh: 它喜欢在公园里跑。

sentences.en: He also likes to play with a ball.
sentences.zh: 它也喜欢玩球。

sentences.en: Max is not just a pet.
sentences.zh: Max不仅仅是一只宠物。

sentences.en: He is my best friend.
sentences.zh: 它是我最好的朋友。

sentences.en: I go to school from Monday to Friday.
sentences.zh: 我周一到周五去上学。

sentences.en: My favorite subject is English.
sentences.zh: 我最喜欢的科目是英语。

sentences.en: We have a break at 10 o'clock.
sentences.zh: 我们十点休息。

sentences.en: I sit next to my best friend in class.
sentences.zh: 课堂上我坐在最好的朋友旁边。

sentences.en: The teacher gives us homework every day.
sentences.zh: 老师每天给我们留作业。

sentences.en: I enjoy playing sports during PE class.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢体育课上做运动。

sentences.en: Lunch time is my favorite part of the day.
sentences.zh: 午餐时间是我一天中最喜欢的时刻。

sentences.en: I'm in the school choir.
sentences.zh: 我参加了学校合唱团。

sentences.en: School ends at 3:30 in the afternoon.
sentences.zh: 下午三点半放学。

sentences.en: What are you doing this weekend?
sentences.zh: 你这周末要做什么？

sentences.en: I'm going to visit my grandparents.
sentences.zh: 我打算去看望祖父母。

sentences.en: We plan to have a family picnic in the park.
sentences.zh: 我们计划在公园野餐。

sentences.en: My sister is coming home from college.
sentences.zh: 我姐姐要从大学回家。

sentences.en: I need to finish my science project.
sentences.zh: 我需要完成科学项目。

sentences.en: Maybe we can go to the cinema on Sunday.
sentences.zh: 也许我们周日可以去看电影。

sentences.en: There's a new action movie playing.
sentences.zh: 有新动作片在放映。

sentences.en: Let's meet at the mall at 2 PM.
sentences.zh: 我们下午两点在商场碰面吧。

sentences.en: That sounds like a great plan!
sentences.zh: 听起来是个好计划！

sentences.en: I need to go to the supermarket to buy groceries.
sentences.zh: 我需要去超市买杂货。

sentences.en: Let's make a shopping list before we go.
sentences.zh: 我们出发前列个购物清单吧。

sentences.en: We need milk, eggs, and bread.
sentences.zh: 我们需要牛奶、鸡蛋和面包。

sentences.en: The fruits look fresh today.
sentences.zh: 今天的水果看起来很新鲜。

sentences.en: This brand of cereal is on sale.
sentences.zh: 这个品牌的麦片在打折。

sentences.en: Don't forget to buy vegetables for dinner.
sentences.zh: 别忘了买晚餐的蔬菜。

sentences.en: We also need some snacks for the kids.
sentences.zh: 我们还需要给孩子们买些零食。

sentences.en: Let's check out at the self-service counter.
sentences.zh: 我们去自助结账台结账吧。

sentences.en: Remember to bring your reusable bags.
sentences.zh: 记得带环保袋。

questions.question: What should they make before going?

sentences.en: How are you feeling today?
sentences.zh: 你今天感觉怎么样？

sentences.en: I'm feeling a bit tired this morning.
sentences.zh: 今天早上我觉得有点累。

sentences.en: I'm so happy about my exam results!
sentences.zh: 我对我的考试成绩非常开心！

sentences.en: She was disappointed when she didn't win.
sentences.zh: 她没赢的时候很失望。

sentences.en: I'm excited about our trip next week.
sentences.zh: 我对下周的旅行感到很兴奋。

sentences.en: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
sentences.zh: 别担心，一切都会好起来的。

sentences.en: I feel grateful for my family and friends.
sentences.zh: 我感激我的家人和朋友。

sentences.en: Sometimes I feel nervous before a test.
sentences.zh: 有时候考试前我会紧张。

sentences.en: It's okay to feel sad sometimes.
sentences.zh: 有时候感到难过是正常的。

questions.question: How did the person feel about their exam results?
questions.zh: How did the person feel about their exam results?

sentences.en: My mother has long brown hair and blue eyes.
sentences.zh: 我妈妈有长长的棕色头发和蓝色的眼睛。

sentences.en: He is tall and wears glasses.
sentences.zh: 他个子很高，戴着眼镜。

sentences.en: She is very kind and always helps others.
sentences.zh: 她非常善良，总是帮助别人。

sentences.en: My brother is funny and makes everyone laugh.
sentences.zh: 我弟弟很有趣，总逗大家笑。

sentences.en: Our teacher is strict but fair.
sentences.zh: 我们的老师严格但公平。

sentences.en: She has a warm and friendly smile.
sentences.zh: 她有温暖友好的微笑。

sentences.en: He is very hardworking and never gives up.
sentences.zh: 他很勤奋，从不放弃。

sentences.en: They are a very close family.
sentences.zh: 他们是非常亲密的家庭。

sentences.en: I admire her positive attitude towards life.
sentences.zh: 我钦佩她积极的生活态度。

sentences.en: I need to send a package to my friend.
sentences.zh: 我需要寄一个包裹给朋友。

sentences.en: What's the postage for this letter to Japan?
sentences.zh: 这封信寄到日本邮费是多少？

sentences.en: It depends on the weight and delivery speed.
sentences.zh: 取决于重量和寄送速度。

sentences.en: I'd like to send it by air mail, please.
sentences.zh: 我想寄航空邮件。

sentences.en: It will take about five to seven business days.
sentences.zh: 大约需要五到七个工作日。

sentences.en: You need to fill out this customs form.
sentences.zh: 你需要填一下这张海关申报表。

sentences.en: I also want to buy some stamps.
sentences.zh: 我还想买一些邮票。

sentences.en: Do you sell postcards here?
sentences.zh: 你们这里卖明信片吗？

sentences.en: Your package has been sent. Here's the tracking number.
sentences.zh: 您的包裹已寄出，这是追踪号码。

questions.question: What does the person need to send?
questions.zh: What does the person need to send?

questions.zh: How long will it take by air mail?

sentences.en: Hello, may I speak to Mr. Wang, please?
sentences.zh: 你好，请找王先生接电话好吗？

sentences.en: I'm sorry, he's in a meeting right now.
sentences.zh: 对不起，他正在开会。

sentences.en: Can I take a message?
sentences.zh: 我能捎个口信吗？

sentences.en: Please tell him that Lisa called.
sentences.zh: 请告诉他Lisa打过电话。

sentences.en: Could you ask him to call me back?
sentences.zh: 你能让他给我回电话吗？

sentences.en: Does he have your number?
sentences.zh: 他有你的号码吗？

sentences.en: My number is 138-5555-1234.
I'll make sure he gets the message.
sentences.zh: 我一定转告他。

sentences.en: Thank you for your help. Goodbye!
sentences.zh: 谢谢你的帮助，再见！

questions.zh: Who does the caller want to speak to?

sentences.en: Are you free this Saturday evening?
sentences.zh: 你这周六晚上有空吗？

sentences.en: I'm having a small dinner party at my place.
sentences.zh: 我准备在我家办一个小型晚宴。

sentences.en: Would you like to come?
sentences.zh: 你愿意来吗？

sentences.en: I'd love to! What time should I arrive?
sentences.zh: 太好了！我该几点到？

sentences.en: The party starts at 7 PM.
sentences.zh: 派对七点开始。

sentences.en: Should I bring anything?
sentences.zh: 我需要带什么东西吗？

sentences.en: Just bring yourself! I'll take care of everything.
sentences.zh: 你人来就行，我会准备好一切。

sentences.en: Can I bring my friend along?
sentences.zh: 我能带我的朋友一起来吗？

sentences.en: Of course, the more the merrier.
sentences.zh: 当然，人越多越开心。

questions.question: What event is being planned?
questions.zh: What event is being planned?

questions.question: What time does the party start?
questions.zh: What time does the party start?

questions.question: Should the guest bring something?
questions.zh: Should the guest bring something?

sentences.en: I need to manage my time better.
sentences.zh: 我需要更好地管理时间。

sentences.en: I make a to-do list every morning.
sentences.zh: 我每天早上列一个待办事项清单。

sentences.en: It helps me stay organized.
sentences.zh: 这帮助我保持有条理。

sentences.en: I prioritize the most important tasks first.
sentences.zh: 我优先做最重要的任务。

sentences.en: I use a calendar app to schedule my activities.
sentences.zh: 我用日历应用来安排活动。

sentences.en: I try to avoid procrastination.
sentences.zh: 我尽量不拖延。

sentences.en: Taking short breaks helps me stay focused.
sentences.zh: 短暂休息帮助我保持专注。

sentences.en: I always set deadlines for myself.
sentences.zh: 我总是给自己设定期限。

sentences.en: Good time management reduces stress.
sentences.zh: 好的时间管理能减轻压力。

questions.question: What does the person make every morning?
questions.zh: What does the person make every morning?

questions.question: How does the person stay organized?
questions.zh: How does the person stay organized?

questions.question: What helps reduce stress?
questions.zh: What helps reduce stress?

sentences.en: What do you want to be when you grow up?
sentences.zh: 你长大后想做什么？

sentences.en: I want to become a doctor and help people.
sentences.zh: 我想成为一名医生，帮助别人。

sentences.en: My sister dreams of becoming a famous singer.
sentences.zh: 我姐姐梦想成为著名歌手。

sentences.en: He is studying hard to become an engineer.
sentences.zh: 他正在努力学习成为一名工程师。

sentences.en: Being a teacher is a rewarding profession.
sentences.zh: 做老师是一份有回报的职业。

sentences.en: I'm interested in starting my own business.
sentences.zh: 我对创业感兴趣。

sentences.en: It's important to find a career you love.
sentences.zh: 找到你热爱的职业很重要。

sentences.en: Never give up on your dreams.
sentences.zh: 永远不要放弃你的梦想。

sentences.en: With hard work, anything is possible.
sentences.zh: 只要努力，一切皆有可能。

questions.question: What does the person want to become?
questions.zh: What does the person want to become?

questions.question: What does the sister dream of?
questions.zh: What does the sister dream of?

questions.question: What profession is described as rewarding?
questions.zh: What profession is described as rewarding?

sentences.en: I use an online translator to help me understand.
sentences.zh: 我用在线翻译器帮助理解。

sentences.en: Machine translation has improved a lot.
sentences.zh: 机器翻译进步了很多。

sentences.en: But it's not always accurate.
sentences.zh: 但并非总是准确的。

sentences.en: I practice translation by reading English news.
sentences.zh: 我通过读英文新闻练习翻译。

sentences.en: It helps me learn new words in context.
sentences.zh: 这帮助我在语境中学习新词。

sentences.en: Can you translate this sentence for me?
sentences.zh: 你能帮我翻译一下这个句子吗？

sentences.en: The meaning is similar but the tone is different.
sentences.zh: 意思相近但语气不同。

sentences.en: Learning a language is like learning to see the world differently.
sentences.zh: 学语言就像学着用不同的方式看世界。

sentences.en: Every language has its own beauty.
sentences.zh: 每种语言都有它自己的美。

questions.question: What does the person use to help understand?
questions.zh: What does the person use to help understand?

questions.question: How does the person practice translation?
questions.zh: How does the person practice translation?

questions.question: Is machine translation always accurate?
questions.zh: Is machine translation always accurate?

sentences.en: I have a reservation under the name Chen.
sentences.zh: 我用陈这个名字预订了房间。

sentences.en: Let me check the system. Yes, I found it.
sentences.zh: 让我查一下系统。好的，找到了。

sentences.en: You're booked in room 508 on the fifth floor.
sentences.zh: 您预订的是五楼508房间。

sentences.en: Here is your room key card.
sentences.zh: 这是您的房卡。

sentences.en: Breakfast is served from 7 to 10 AM.
sentences.zh: 早餐供应时间是早上七点到十点。

sentences.en: The gym and pool are on the ground floor.
sentences.zh: 健身房和游泳池在一楼。

sentences.en: Is there a restaurant in the hotel?
sentences.zh: 酒店里有餐厅吗？

sentences.en: Yes, there's a Chinese restaurant on the second floor.
sentences.zh: 有的，二楼有一家中餐厅。

sentences.en: If you need anything, just call the front desk.
sentences.zh: 如果你需要什么，请拨打前台电话。

questions.question: What room is the guest in?
questions.zh: What room is the guest in?

questions.question: What are the breakfast hours?
questions.zh: What are the breakfast hours?

questions.question: Where is the Chinese restaurant?
questions.zh: Where is the Chinese restaurant?

sentences.en: Excuse me, how much is this item?
sentences.zh: 打扰一下，这个多少钱？

sentences.en: It's $29.99. There's a 10% discount this week.
sentences.zh: 29.99美元，这周打九折。

sentences.en: That's a good deal. I'll take it.
sentences.zh: 价格不错，我买了。

sentences.en: Is there a warranty on this product?
sentences.zh: 这个产品有保修吗？

sentences.en: Yes, it comes with a one-year warranty.
sentences.zh: 有的，有一年的保修期。

sentences.en: Do you accept credit cards?
sentences.zh: 你们接受信用卡吗？

sentences.en: We accept all major credit cards.
sentences.zh: 我们接受所有主要信用卡。

sentences.en: Can I get a refund if it doesn't fit?
sentences.zh: 如果不合身可以退款吗？

sentences.en: Yes, we offer free returns within 30 days.
sentences.zh: 可以，30天内免费退货。

questions.question: How much is the item?
questions.zh: How much is the item?

questions.question: How long is the warranty?
questions.zh: How long is the warranty?

questions.question: How long is the return period?
questions.zh: How long is the return period?

sentences.en: You look upset. Is everything okay?
sentences.zh: 你看起来不开心，还好吗？

sentences.en: I failed my driving test again.
sentences.zh: 我驾照考试又挂了。

sentences.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Don't give up.
sentences.zh: 听到这个我很难过。别放弃。

sentences.en: You can try again next month.
sentences.zh: 你可以下个月再试一次。

sentences.en: I know you can do it. You've improved a lot.
sentences.zh: 我知道你能行，你已经进步很多了。

sentences.en: Thank you for your encouragement.
sentences.zh: 谢谢你的鼓励。

sentences.en: That's what friends are for.
sentences.zh: 朋友就是这样的。

sentences.en: Let's go get some ice cream to cheer you up.
sentences.zh: 我们去吃冰淇淋让你开心起来吧。

sentences.en: That sounds nice. You're a great friend.
sentences.zh: 听起来不错，你是个好朋友。

questions.question: Why is the person upset?
questions.zh: Why is the person upset?

questions.question: What does the friend suggest doing?
questions.zh: What does the friend suggest doing?

questions.question: What does the friend say about improvement?
questions.zh: What does the friend say about improvement?

sentences.en: Good morning! How did you sleep?
sentences.zh: 早上好！睡得好吗？

sentences.en: I slept well, thank you. And you?
sentences.zh: 我睡得不错，谢谢。你呢？

sentences.en: I had a great night's sleep too.
sentences.zh: 我也睡得很好。

sentences.en: What would you like for breakfast?
sentences.zh: 早餐想吃什么？

sentences.en: I'll have some toast and a cup of coffee.
sentences.zh: 我要一些吐司和一杯咖啡。

sentences.en: Don't forget your umbrella. It might rain.
sentences.zh: 别忘了带伞，可能会下雨。

sentences.en: Thanks for the reminder. See you later!
sentences.zh: 谢谢提醒，回头见！

sentences.en: Have a great day at work!
sentences.zh: 祝你工作愉快！

sentences.en: You too! Take care!
sentences.zh: 你也是！保重！

questions.question: What is for breakfast?
questions.zh: What is for breakfast?

questions.zh: Why should the person bring an umbrella?

questions.zh: What does the person say in response to the reminder?

sentences.en: Staying healthy requires good daily habits.
sentences.zh: 保持健康需要良好的日常习惯。

sentences.en: I drink eight glasses of water every day.
sentences.zh: 我每天喝八杯水。

sentences.en: Getting enough sleep is essential for health.
sentences.zh: 充足睡眠对健康至关重要。

sentences.en: I try to eat five portions of fruits and vegetables daily.
sentences.zh: 我每天尽量吃五份蔬果。

sentences.en: Walking for 30 minutes a day is great exercise.
sentences.zh: 每天步行30分钟是很好的运动。

sentences.en: I limit my screen time before bed.
sentences.zh: 我睡前限制看屏幕的时间。

sentences.en: Taking the stairs instead of the elevator helps.
sentences.zh: 走楼梯而不是乘电梯很有帮助。

sentences.en: I meditate for 10 minutes every morning.
sentences.zh: 我每天早上冥想十分钟。

sentences.en: Small healthy habits add up to big results.
sentences.zh: 小的健康习惯积累起来就是大成果。

questions.question: How many glasses of water does the person drink daily?
questions.zh: How many glasses of water does the person drink daily?

questions.question: What does the person do before bed?
questions.zh: What does the person do before bed?

questions.question: How long does the person meditate?
questions.zh: How long does the person meditate?

sentences.en: My trip to Thailand was unforgettable.
sentences.zh: 我的泰国之行令人难忘。

sentences.en: I visited Bangkok and the beautiful beaches in the south.
sentences.zh: 我去了曼谷和南部美丽的海滩。

sentences.en: The food there was amazing and very spicy.
sentences.zh: 那里的食物很棒，而且很辣。

sentences.en: I tried snorkeling for the first time.
sentences.zh: 我第一次尝试了浮潜。

sentences.en: The local people were incredibly friendly.
sentences.zh: 当地人非常友好。

sentences.en: I learned a few phrases in Thai.
sentences.zh: 我学了几句泰语。

sentences.en: The temples were absolutely stunning.
sentences.zh: 寺庙非常壮观。

sentences.en: I wish I could have stayed longer.
sentences.zh: 我真希望能多待几天。

sentences.en: Traveling opens your mind to new cultures.
sentences.zh: 旅行让你对新文化开阔眼界。

questions.question: What did the person try for the first time?
questions.zh: What did the person try for the first time?

questions.question: How does the person describe the local people?
questions.zh: How does the person describe the local people?

questions.question: What does traveling do to your mind?
questions.zh: What does traveling do to your mind?

sentences.en: Technology has changed how we communicate.
sentences.zh: 科技改变了我们的沟通方式。

sentences.en: Smartphones have become an essential part of our lives.
sentences.zh: 智能手机已成为我们生活的重要组成部分。

sentences.en: Social media connects people across the globe.
sentences.zh: 社交媒体连接了世界各地的人们。

sentences.en: However, too much screen time can be harmful.
sentences.zh: 然而，过多的屏幕时间可能有害。

sentences.en: Online shopping has made buying things very convenient.
sentences.zh: 网购使购物变得非常方便。

sentences.en: Remote work has become more common since the pandemic.
sentences.zh: 疫情以来远程办公变得更常见。

sentences.en: Technology can help with education through online classes.
sentences.zh: 科技通过在线课程帮助教育。

sentences.en: We need to find a balance between online and offline life.
sentences.zh: 我们需要在线上和线下生活之间找到平衡。

sentences.en: Technology is a tool. How we use it matters most.
sentences.zh: 科技是工具，如何使用它才是最重要的。

questions.question: What has become an essential part of our lives?
questions.zh: What has become an essential part of our lives?

questions.question: What negative effect of technology is mentioned?
questions.zh: What negative effect of technology is mentioned?

questions.question: What has become more common since the pandemic?
questions.zh: What has become more common since the pandemic?

sentences.en: Learning English opens up many opportunities.
sentences.zh: 学英语打开了很多机会。

sentences.en: I practice speaking English every day.
sentences.zh: 我每天练习说英语。

sentences.en: Listening to English podcasts helps improve my comprehension.
sentences.zh: 听英语播客有助于提高理解能力。

sentences.en: I write a short journal entry in English each night.
sentences.zh: 我每晚用英语写一篇简短的日记。

sentences.en: Making mistakes is a natural part of learning.
sentences.zh: 犯错误是学习的自然部分。

sentences.en: I use flashcards to remember new vocabulary.
sentences.zh: 我用闪卡来记忆新词汇。

sentences.en: Watching English movies with subtitles is helpful.
sentences.zh: 看带字幕的英文电影很有帮助。

sentences.en: Speaking with native speakers is the best practice.
sentences.zh: 和母语者对话是最好的练习。

sentences.en: Consistency is more important than intensity.
sentences.zh: 持之以恒比强度更重要。

questions.question: How does the person practice speaking?
questions.zh: How does the person practice speaking?

questions.question: What helps the person remember new vocabulary?
questions.zh: What helps the person remember new vocabulary?

questions.question: What is more important than intensity?
questions.zh: What is more important than intensity?

sentences.en: There are many ways to have fun in your free time.
sentences.zh: 有很多方式可以在空闲时间娱乐。

sentences.en: I enjoy playing board games with my family.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢和家人玩桌游。

sentences.en: Reading a good book is my favorite way to relax.
sentences.zh: 读一本好书是我最喜欢的放松方式。

sentences.en: We often go bowling on Friday nights.
sentences.zh: 我们经常周五晚上去打保龄球。

sentences.en: Karaoke is very popular among my friends.
sentences.zh: K歌在我的朋友中很受欢迎。

sentences.en: I like to watch documentaries about nature.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢看关于自然的纪录片。

sentences.en: Gardening has become a new hobby for me.
sentences.zh: 园艺成了我的一个新爱好。

sentences.en: There's nothing better than a movie night at home.
sentences.zh: 没有什么比在家看电影之夜更好了。

sentences.en: Having hobbies makes life more enjoyable.
sentences.zh: 有爱好让生活更愉快。

questions.question: What does the person enjoy playing with family?
questions.zh: What does the person enjoy playing with family?

questions.question: What is the person's favorite way to relax?
questions.zh: What is the person's favorite way to relax?

questions.question: What new hobby has the person started?
questions.zh: What new hobby has the person started?

sentences.en: Good evening, do you have a table for two?
sentences.zh: 晚上好，请问有两人桌吗？

sentences.en: I'd like to see the menu, please.
sentences.zh: 我想看看菜单。

sentences.en: What would you recommend?
sentences.zh: 你有什么推荐的？

sentences.en: The grilled salmon sounds delicious.
sentences.zh: 烤三文鱼听起来不错。

sentences.en: I'll have the pasta with tomato sauce.
sentences.zh: 我要番茄酱意面。

sentences.en: Could I have a glass of red wine?
sentences.zh: 能给我一杯红葡萄酒吗？

sentences.en: This steak is cooked perfectly.
sentences.zh: 这块牛排做得恰到好处。

sentences.en: Can I have the bill, please?
sentences.zh: 请给我账单好吗？

sentences.en: The service here is excellent.
sentences.zh: 这里的服务非常好。

questions.question: What does the customer ask for first?
questions.zh: What does the customer ask for first?

questions.question: What food does the customer order?
questions.zh: What food does the customer order?

questions.question: How does the customer describe the steak?
questions.zh: How does the customer describe the steak?

sentences.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the museum?
sentences.zh: 打扰一下，去博物馆怎么走？

sentences.en: Go straight for two blocks.
sentences.zh: 直走两个街区。

sentences.en: Turn right at the first traffic light.
sentences.zh: 在第一个红绿灯右转。

sentences.en: The museum is on your left, next to the park.
sentences.zh: 博物馆在你左边，公园旁边。

sentences.en: Is it far from here?
sentences.zh: 离这里远吗？

sentences.en: It's about a ten-minute walk.
sentences.zh: 步行大约十分钟。

sentences.en: You can also take bus number 5.
sentences.zh: 你也可以坐5路公交车。

sentences.en: Thank you very much for your help.
sentences.zh: 非常感谢你的帮助。

sentences.en: You're welcome. Have a nice day!
sentences.zh: 不客气。祝你愉快！

questions.question: Where does the person want to go?
questions.zh: Where does the person want to go?

questions.question: How long does it take to walk?
questions.zh: How long does it take to walk?

questions.question: Which bus can the person take?
questions.zh: Which bus can the person take?

sentences.en: What's the weather like today?
sentences.zh: 今天天气怎么样？

sentences.en: It's sunny and warm, perfect for a picnic.
sentences.zh: 今天晴暖，适合野餐。

sentences.en: The forecast says it will rain tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 天气预报说明天会下雨。

sentences.en: Don't forget to bring an umbrella.
sentences.zh: 别忘了带伞。

sentences.en: Spring is my favorite season.
sentences.zh: 春天是我最喜欢的季节。

sentences.en: The flowers bloom and the birds sing.
sentences.zh: 花儿盛开，鸟儿歌唱。

sentences.en: Summer is too hot for me.
sentences.zh: 夏天对我来说太热了。

sentences.en: Autumn leaves are beautiful when they change color.
sentences.zh: 秋天的叶子变色时很美。

sentences.en: Winter is cold but we can go skiing.
sentences.zh: 冬天很冷，但我们可以去滑雪。

questions.question: What is the weather like today?
questions.zh: What is the weather like today?

questions.question: Which season does the speaker like best?
questions.zh: Which season does the speaker like best?

questions.question: What should the person bring tomorrow?
questions.zh: What should the person bring tomorrow?

sentences.en: I don't feel well. I need to see a doctor.
sentences.zh: 我感觉不舒服，需要看医生。

sentences.en: What are your symptoms?
sentences.zh: 你有什么症状？

sentences.en: I have a headache and a sore throat.
sentences.zh: 我头疼，嗓子也疼。

sentences.en: Let me check your temperature.
sentences.zh: 让我量一下你的体温。

sentences.en: You have a mild fever.
sentences.zh: 你有点发烧。

sentences.en: I'll prescribe some medicine for you.
sentences.zh: 我给你开些药。

sentences.en: Take this medicine three times a day.
sentences.zh: 这药一天吃三次。

sentences.en: You should drink plenty of water and rest.
sentences.zh: 你应该多喝水多休息。

sentences.en: Come back if you don't feel better in three days.
sentences.zh: 如果三天后还不好转就再来。

questions.question: What are the patient's symptoms?
questions.zh: What are the patient's symptoms?

questions.question: What does the patient have?
questions.zh: What does the patient have?

questions.question: How should the patient take the medicine?
questions.zh: How should the patient take the medicine?

sentences.en: I'd like to open a savings account.
sentences.zh: 我想开一个储蓄账户。

sentences.en: Could you please fill out this form?
sentences.zh: 请填一下这张表格好吗？

sentences.en: What documents do I need to bring?
sentences.zh: 我需要带什么证件？

sentences.en: Your ID card and proof of address.
sentences.zh: 你的身份证和地址证明。

sentences.en: I'd like to deposit some money.
sentences.zh: 我想存一些钱。

sentences.en: What is the interest rate for savings?
sentences.zh: 储蓄利率是多少？

sentences.en: I also want to apply for a credit card.
sentences.zh: 我还想申请一张信用卡。

sentences.en: Your account is ready. Here is your bank card.
sentences.zh: 你的账户已办好，这是你的银行卡。

sentences.en: You can use the mobile app for online banking.
sentences.zh: 你可以用手机应用进行网上银行操作。

questions.question: What does the customer want to do?
questions.zh: What does the customer want to do?

questions.question: What documents are needed?
questions.zh: What documents are needed?
options: ID card and proof of address

questions.question: What else does the customer want?
questions.zh: What else does the customer want?

sentences.en: Are you just looking, or can I help you?
sentences.zh: 你是随便看看还是需要帮助？

sentences.en: I'm looking for a dress for a party.
sentences.zh: 我在找一条参加派对的裙子。

sentences.en: What size do you wear?
sentences.zh: 你穿多大码？

sentences.en: I usually wear a medium.
sentences.zh: 我通常穿M码。

sentences.en: This one comes in three colors.
sentences.zh: 这款有三种颜色。

sentences.en: Can I try this on?
sentences.zh: 我能试穿一下吗？

sentences.en: The fitting room is over there.
sentences.zh: 试衣间在那边。

sentences.en: It fits perfectly. I'll take it.
sentences.zh: 非常合身，我买了。

sentences.en: Would you like to pay by card or cash?
sentences.zh: 你刷卡还是付现金？

sentences.en: I'd like to book a double room for three nights.
sentences.zh: 我想预订一间双人房住三晚。

sentences.en: Do you have any rooms available this weekend?
sentences.zh: 这周末有房间吗？

sentences.en: Yes, we have a room with a sea view.
sentences.zh: 有的，我们有一间海景房。

sentences.en: What's the price per night?
sentences.zh: 每晚多少钱？

sentences.en: It's $120 per night including breakfast.
sentences.zh: 每晚120美元，含早餐。

sentences.en: Does the room have free Wi-Fi?
sentences.zh: 房间有免费Wi-Fi吗？

sentences.en: Yes, and it also has a mini bar.
sentences.zh: 有的，还有小冰箱。

sentences.en: I'd like to check in on Friday afternoon.
sentences.zh: 我想周五下午入住。

sentences.en: Check-out time is 11 AM.
sentences.zh: 退房时间是上午11点。

questions.question: What type of room does the guest want?
questions.zh: What type of room does the guest want?

questions.zh: How much is the room per night?

questions.zh: What is included in the price?

sentences.en: Good morning. I have a meeting at 10 AM.
sentences.zh: 早上好，我十点有个会议。

sentences.en: Could you send me the report by noon?
sentences.zh: 你能在中午前把报告发给我吗？

sentences.en: I need to discuss the project timeline.
sentences.zh: 我需要讨论一下项目时间表。

sentences.en: The deadline has been moved to next Friday.
sentences.zh: 截止日期已提前到下周五。

sentences.en: We need to increase our team productivity.
sentences.zh: 我们需要提高团队效率。

sentences.en: Let's schedule a brainstorming session.
sentences.zh: 我们安排一次头脑风暴会议吧。

sentences.en: I appreciate your hard work on this project.
sentences.zh: 我感谢你在这个项目上的努力。

sentences.en: Could you please CC me on that email?
sentences.zh: 请把那封邮件抄送给我好吗？

sentences.en: Let me know if you have any questions.
sentences.zh: 如果你有任何问题请告诉我。

questions.question: When does the speaker have a meeting?
questions.zh: When does the speaker have a meeting?

questions.question: When is the new deadline?
questions.zh: When is the new deadline?

questions.question: What does the speaker suggest?
questions.zh: What does the speaker suggest?

sentences.en: Hello, this is Sarah speaking.
sentences.zh: 你好，我是Sarah。

sentences.en: I'm calling about your job application.
sentences.zh: 我打电话来是关于你的工作申请。

sentences.en: Could you please hold for a moment?
sentences.zh: 请稍等好吗？

sentences.en: I'll transfer you to the HR department.
sentences.zh: 我帮你转接人事部。

sentences.en: Please send your resume as a PDF attachment.
sentences.zh: 请把简历作为PDF附件发送。

sentences.en: I haven't received your email yet.
sentences.zh: 我还没有收到你的邮件。

sentences.en: Could you resend it to the correct address?
sentences.zh: 你能重新发送到正确的地址吗？

sentences.en: I'll follow up with an email confirmation.
sentences.zh: 我会以邮件确认跟进。

sentences.en: Thank you for your prompt response.
sentences.zh: 感谢你及时的回复。

questions.question: Who is the caller?
questions.zh: Who is the caller?

questions.question: What is the call about?
questions.zh: What is the call about?

questions.question: How should the resume be sent?
questions.zh: How should the resume be sent?

sentences.en: What do you like to do in your free time?
sentences.zh: 你空闲时间喜欢做什么？

sentences.en: I enjoy reading books and listening to music.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢读书和听音乐。

sentences.en: I've been learning to play the guitar.
sentences.zh: 我一直在学弹吉他。

sentences.en: That sounds interesting! How long have you been playing?
sentences.zh: 听起来很有趣！你学了多久了？

sentences.en: About six months. It's challenging but rewarding.
sentences.zh: 大约六个月，很有挑战但很有收获。

sentences.en: I like outdoor activities like hiking and cycling.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢户外活动，比如远足和骑自行车。

sentences.en: Do you prefer indoor or outdoor hobbies?
sentences.zh: 你更喜欢室内还是室外爱好？

sentences.en: I like both. Variety makes life exciting.
sentences.zh: 两种都喜欢，多样化让生活更有趣。

sentences.en: Maybe we can go hiking together this weekend.
sentences.zh: 也许这周末我们可以一起去远足。

questions.question: What hobby has the person been learning?
questions.zh: What hobby has the person been learning?

questions.question: How long have they been learning?
questions.zh: How long have they been learning?

questions.question: What outdoor activity is mentioned?
questions.zh: What outdoor activity is mentioned?

sentences.en: I'm planning a trip to Japan next spring.
sentences.zh: 我计划明年春天去日本旅行。

sentences.en: Have you booked your flights yet?
sentences.zh: 你订好机票了吗？

sentences.en: Not yet. I'm still comparing prices.
sentences.zh: 还没，我还在比较价格。

sentences.en: I recommend visiting Kyoto during cherry blossom season.
sentences.zh: 我推荐樱花季去京都。

sentences.en: That sounds wonderful! I'll add it to my itinerary.
sentences.zh: 听起来太棒了！我会加进行程。

sentences.en: Don't forget to try the local cuisine.
sentences.zh: 别忘了尝试当地美食。

sentences.en: I need to apply for a visa first.
sentences.zh: 我需要先申请签证。

sentences.en: How long are you planning to stay?
sentences.zh: 你打算待多久？

sentences.en: About two weeks. I want to visit several cities.
sentences.zh: 大约两周，我想去几个城市。

questions.question: When is the planned trip?
questions.zh: When is the planned trip?

questions.question: Where is recommended to visit?
questions.zh: Where is recommended to visit?

questions.question: How long will the trip be?
questions.zh: How long will the trip be?

sentences.en: What kind of movies do you enjoy?
sentences.zh: 你喜欢看什么类型的电影？

sentences.en: I'm a big fan of science fiction films.
sentences.zh: 我是科幻电影的超级粉丝。

sentences.en: Have you seen the latest blockbuster?
sentences.zh: 你看过最新的那部大片吗？

sentences.en: Not yet. Is it worth watching?
sentences.zh: 还没看，值得看吗？

sentences.en: The special effects are incredible.
sentences.zh: 特效非常震撼。

sentences.en: I prefer movies with a good storyline.
sentences.zh: 我更喜欢有好的故事情节的电影。

sentences.en: What about music? What genre do you like?
sentences.zh: 音乐呢？你喜欢什么风格？

sentences.en: I like pop and classical music.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢流行和古典音乐。

sentences.en: Do you play any musical instruments?
sentences.zh: 你会演奏什么乐器吗？

questions.question: What movie genre does the person like?
questions.zh: What movie genre does the person like?

questions.zh: What does the person look for in movies?

questions.zh: What music genres does the person like?

sentences.en: We should all do our part to protect the environment.
sentences.zh: 我们都应为保护环境尽一份力。

sentences.en: Recycling is a simple way to reduce waste.
sentences.zh: 回收利用是减少浪费的简单方法。

sentences.en: I always bring my own shopping bag.
sentences.zh: 我总是自带购物袋。

sentences.en: We should reduce our use of plastic.
sentences.zh: 我们应该减少使用塑料。

sentences.en: Solar energy is a clean and renewable power source.
sentences.zh: 太阳能是清洁可再生的能源。

sentences.en: Planting trees helps fight climate change.
sentences.zh: 植树有助于应对气候变化。

sentences.en: I've started using a reusable water bottle.
sentences.zh: 我开始使用可重复使用的水瓶。

sentences.en: Small changes in our daily habits can make a big difference.
sentences.zh: 日常习惯的小改变可以产生大影响。

sentences.en: Let's work together for a greener future.
sentences.zh: 让我们共同努力创造更绿色的未来。

questions.question: What simple way to reduce waste is mentioned?
questions.zh: What simple way to reduce waste is mentioned?

questions.question: What type of energy is described as clean?
questions.zh: What type of energy is described as clean?

questions.question: What helps fight climate change?
questions.zh: What helps fight climate change?

sentences.en: Education is the key to a better future.
sentences.zh: 教育是通往更美好未来的钥匙。

sentences.en: I believe in lifelong learning.
sentences.zh: 我信奉终身学习。

sentences.en: Online courses have made education more accessible.
sentences.zh: 在线课程让教育更便利。

sentences.en: I'm taking an English conversation class every week.
sentences.zh: 我每周都上英语会话课。

sentences.en: Practice makes perfect when learning a language.
sentences.zh: 学语言熟能生巧。

sentences.en: Reading is one of the best ways to learn.
sentences.zh: 阅读是最好的学习方法之一。

sentences.en: I like to watch English movies with subtitles.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢看带字幕的英文电影。

sentences.en: Learning from mistakes is part of the process.
sentences.zh: 从错误中学习是过程的一部分。

sentences.en: Never stop learning, because life never stops teaching.
sentences.zh: 永不停止学习，因为生活永不停止教导。

questions.question: What class does the person take weekly?
questions.zh: What class does the person take weekly?

questions.question: What is one of the best ways to learn?
questions.zh: What is one of the best ways to learn?

questions.question: What helps when watching English movies?
questions.zh: What helps when watching English movies?

sentences.en: I go to the gym three times a week.
sentences.zh: 我每周去三次健身房。

sentences.en: Regular exercise is important for good health.
sentences.zh: 定期运动对健康很重要。

sentences.en: I like to do cardio and strength training.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢做有氧和力量训练。

sentences.en: What's your favorite way to stay fit?
sentences.zh: 你保持健康最喜欢的方式是什么？

sentences.en: I enjoy jogging in the park every morning.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢每天早上在公园慢跑。

sentences.en: A balanced diet is just as important as exercise.
sentences.zh: 均衡饮食和运动同样重要。

sentences.en: I try to eat more vegetables and less sugar.
sentences.zh: 我尽量多吃蔬菜少吃糖。

sentences.en: Getting enough sleep is also crucial.
sentences.zh: 充足的睡眠也很关键。

sentences.en: Health is the greatest wealth.
sentences.zh: 健康是最宝贵的财富。

questions.question: How often does the person go to the gym?
questions.zh: How often does the person go to the gym?

questions.question: What does the person do every morning?
questions.zh: What does the person do every morning?

questions.zh: What dietary change does the person make?
options: Eat more vegetables and less sugar

sentences.en: Hi, I don't think we've met. I'm Alex.
sentences.zh: 嗨，我们好像没见过。我是Alex。

sentences.en: Nice to meet you! Where are you from?
sentences.zh: 很高兴认识你！你从哪里来？

sentences.en: I'm from Canada. I just moved here for work.
sentences.zh: 我来自加拿大，刚搬来这里工作。

sentences.en: How are you finding the city so far?
sentences.zh: 你觉得这个城市怎么样？

sentences.en: It's wonderful. People are very friendly.
sentences.zh: 很棒，人们非常友好。

sentences.en: Would you like to grab coffee sometime?
sentences.zh: 什么时候一起喝杯咖啡？

sentences.en: I'd love to. Let me give you my number.
sentences.zh: 太好了，我给你我的号码。

sentences.en: We're having a small gathering this Friday.
sentences.zh: 这周五我们有个小型聚会。

sentences.en: You're welcome to join us!
sentences.zh: 欢迎你加入我们！

questions.question: Where is Alex from?
questions.zh: Where is Alex from?

questions.zh: Why did Alex move?

questions.zh: What event is happening this Friday?

sentences.en: Technology has transformed the way we live and work.
sentences.zh: 科技改变了我们的生活和工作的方式。

sentences.en: Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing many industries.
sentences.zh: 人工智能正在革新许多行业。

sentences.en: The Internet of Things connects everyday devices to the web.
sentences.zh: 物联网将日常设备连接到网络。

sentences.en: Cybersecurity has become a major concern for everyone.
sentences.zh: 网络安全已成为每个人都关注的重要问题。

sentences.en: Cloud computing allows us to store data remotely.
sentences.zh: 云计算使我们能够远程存储数据。

sentences.en: Social media has changed how we communicate.
sentences.zh: 社交媒体改变了我们的沟通方式。

sentences.en: Virtual reality is creating new possibilities in education.
sentences.zh: 虚拟现实正在教育领域创造新的可能性。

sentences.en: Blockchain technology goes beyond just cryptocurrency.
sentences.zh: 区块链技术不仅限于加密货币。

sentences.en: We must ensure technology serves humanity, not the other way around.
sentences.zh: 我们必须确保科技服务于人类，而不是反过来。

questions.question: What is revolutionizing many industries?
questions.zh: What is revolutionizing many industries?

questions.question: What concern has become major?
questions.zh: What concern has become major?

questions.question: What is creating new possibilities in education?
questions.zh: What is creating new possibilities in education?

sentences.en: Financial literacy is essential in today's world.
sentences.zh: 财务知识在当今世界至关重要。

sentences.en: I started investing in stocks last year.
sentences.zh: 我去年开始投资股票。

sentences.en: Diversification is key to managing investment risk.
sentences.zh: 分散投资是管理投资风险的关键。

sentences.en: Real estate can be a good long-term investment.
sentences.zh: 房地产可以是一个不错的长期投资。

sentences.en: I'm saving for retirement through a 401k plan.
sentences.zh: 我通过401k计划为退休储蓄。

sentences.en: Understanding compound interest is very important.
sentences.zh: 理解复利非常重要。

sentences.en: I track my expenses using a budgeting app.
sentences.zh: 我用预算应用追踪开支。

sentences.en: Emergency funds should cover three to six months of expenses.
sentences.zh: 应急基金应覆盖三到六个月的开支。

sentences.en: Smart financial planning leads to peace of mind.
sentences.zh: 明智的财务规划带来安心。

questions.question: What is key to managing investment risk?
questions.zh: What is key to managing investment risk?

questions.question: How long should an emergency fund cover?
questions.zh: How long should an emergency fund cover?

questions.question: How does the person track expenses?
questions.zh: How does the person track expenses?

sentences.en: Cultural differences make our world diverse and interesting.
sentences.zh: 文化差异让我们的世界多样而有趣。

sentences.en: In some cultures, it's polite to remove your shoes indoors.
sentences.zh: 在某些文化中，进门脱鞋是礼貌的。

sentences.en: Greeting customs vary greatly around the world.
sentences.zh: 问候习俗在世界各地差异很大。

sentences.en: In Japan, bowing is a traditional form of greeting.
sentences.zh: 在日本，鞠躬是传统的问候方式。

sentences.en: Eye contact can mean different things in different cultures.
sentences.zh: 眼神接触在不同文化中有不同含义。

sentences.en: Understanding cultural differences is important for global business.
sentences.zh: 理解文化差异对全球业务很重要。

sentences.en: Food traditions reflect a culture's history and geography.
sentences.zh: 饮食传统反映了一个文化的历史和地理。

sentences.en: Festivals and celebrations are windows into cultural values.
sentences.zh: 节日和庆典是了解文化价值观的窗口。

sentences.en: Respecting cultural diversity makes the world a better place.
sentences.zh: 尊重文化多样性让世界更美好。

questions.question: What should you remove in some cultures indoors?
questions.zh: What should you remove in some cultures indoors?

questions.question: What is a traditional greeting in Japan?
questions.zh: What is a traditional greeting in Japan?

questions.question: Why are cultural differences important to understand?
questions.zh: Why are cultural differences important to understand?

sentences.en: Everyone has dreams that give life meaning.
sentences.zh: 每个人都有赋予生命意义的梦想。

sentences.en: Setting clear goals is the first step to achieving them.
sentences.zh: 设定明确的目标是实现梦想的第一步。

sentences.en: My dream is to start my own business one day.
sentences.zh: 我的梦想是有一天创办自己的公司。

sentences.en: Hard work and perseverance are essential for success.
sentences.zh: 努力和毅力是成功的关键。

sentences.en: Don't let failures discourage you. Learn from them.
sentences.zh: 不要让失败打击你，从中学习。

sentences.en: Break big goals into smaller, manageable steps.
sentences.zh: 把大目标分解成可管理的小步骤。

sentences.en: Surround yourself with people who support your dreams.
sentences.zh: 和那些支持你梦想的人在一起。

sentences.en: Visualize your success and work towards it every day.
sentences.zh: 想象你的成功，然后每天为之努力。

sentences.en: The future belongs to those who believe in their dreams.
sentences.zh: 未来属于那些相信自己梦想的人。

questions.question: What is the first step to achieving dreams?
questions.zh: What is the first step to achieving dreams?

questions.question: What is essential for success?
questions.zh: What is essential for success?

questions.question: How should you deal with failures?
questions.zh: How should you deal with failures?
